title: Zara's Big Feelings
synopsis: Little Zara experiences big emotions throughout her day with her family and learns that all feelings are okay to have.

pages.text: Zara woke up grumpy. She wanted to wear her favorite purple dress, but it was dirty. "NO!" she said loudly. Her face felt hot and angry.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes stands in her bedroom with clenched fists, surrounded by swirling red angry emotion clouds and jagged red shapes representing frustration
illustration.alt: Zara looking angry in her bedroom with red swirls around her

pages.text: Mama came over and sat down. "You feel mad," she said softly. "Mad feelings are big and red and stormy. That's okay, Zara."

illustration.description: A mother sitting beside a young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes, with red swirling emotion clouds gradually softening around them both in a gentle bedroom setting
illustration.alt: Mama comforting angry Zara as red feelings swirl around them

pages.text: At lunch, Zara dropped her sandwich. It fell apart on the floor. Her bottom lip trembled and tears came down her cheeks like rain.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes sitting at a table looking down at a fallen sandwich, surrounded by blue raindrops and sad blue clouds representing her disappointment
illustration.alt: Zara looking sad with blue rain around her and a dropped sandwich

pages.text: Daddy picked up the pieces. "You feel sad about your sandwich," he said. "Sad feels blue and rainy. Let's make a new one together."

illustration.description: A father helping a young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes make a sandwich together, with blue sad clouds slowly clearing and lighter blue emotions floating away
illustration.alt: Daddy helping Zara make a new sandwich while sad blue feelings fade

pages.text: After dinner, the whole family snuggled on the couch. Zara felt warm and giggly inside. Golden happy bubbles seemed to float all around her.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes snuggled between her parents on a couch, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and golden happy bubbles representing joy and love
illustration.alt: Happy Zara with her family surrounded by yellow sunshine and golden bubbles

pages.text: "All your feelings are okay," Mama whispered. "Mad, sad, happy - they all belong to you." Zara smiled big. She understood now that feelings come and go like weather.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes smiling peacefully, surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of emotion colors - red, blue, and yellow - all swirling together harmoniously in the background
illustration.alt: Zara smiling with all her different colored feelings swirling peacefully around her

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color were Zara's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: Zara's angry feelings were red and swirling like a storm.

questions.question: Why did Zara feel sad at lunch?
questions.explanation: Zara felt sad because she dropped her sandwich and it fell apart.

questions.question: What did Mama tell Zara about feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama told Zara that all her feelings - mad, sad, and happy - are okay to have.

questions.question: How did Zara feel when snuggling with family?
questions.explanation: Zara felt happy and warm when snuggling with her family, with golden bubbles around her.
